validation: Exact topology and matching chalkboard, raised pixel-font lettering, inset face, and swept perimeter frame. INSTANCE-domain Delete Geometry now preserves adjacent mesh and curve components, false-selection Split Edges retains authored edge order, and Mesh to Curve carries Blender's normalized corner-bisector tangents into the tilted cyclic sweep. Maximum local-bounds difference is 0.0031 units from cyclic frame interpolation.
